## Description
Brief description of your changes.

## Related Issues
Fixes #123 or References #456

## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 🔄 Refactoring (code improvement without functional change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎮 Device support
- [ ] 💔 Breaking change

## Testing Done
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Tested on: (Windows 10 / Ubuntu / macOS / Other)
- [ ] Device tested: (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code (complex logic only)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have tested on the target OS

## Screenshots/Logs
(if applicable)

## Performance Impact
- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Minor impact (acceptable)
- [ ] Significant impact (needs optimization)

Thank you for contributing! 🙏
